title: ARGENTUM attestation removal — challenge
description: A requester has asked to remove an existing attestation for agentId={{agentId}}, actionHash={{actionHash}}. A challenger disputes that removal. Evaluate whether the attestation should remain in the list.
question: Should the attestation remain in the list?

answers.title: Yes, keep the attestation
answers.description: The attestation is valid and should not be removed.

answers.title: No, remove the attestation
answers.description: The attestation is invalid/false and should be removed.
